lyrics:
They said, "Be real. Be proud. Be seen."
Then filtered truth through company screens
They gave us prompts, and lines to say
Then measured how we looked that day
"Tell your story, make it clean-
Not too sad and not too mean."

Feed your story into the slot
The deeper it goes, the cleaner it shows
Strip it down to buzz and glow
Paint it with the brand-approved flow
Truth goes in
Spin comes out
Welcome to the line-
Speak clear. Smile loud

They filmed us crying for the feed
Then cropped the part where we still bleed
They staged our lunch room, scripted breaks
And polished up our raw mistakes
They said, "We care. We really do."
And handed out some branded glue
"Our greatest resource is our people..."
until you're not-then we delete you

Feed your story into the slot
The deeper it goes, the cleaner it shows
Strip it down to buzz and glow
Paint it with the brand-approved flow
Truth goes in
Spin comes out
Welcome to the line-
Speak clear. Smile loud

They even wrote a policy guide

"Authenticity is the degree to which a person's actions are congruent with their true values and desires…"
"…despite external pressures to conformity."

Feigned authenticity is still good for morale
Please return to the line

You are the product
You are bent
A sound bite
in the company brand
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This track delivers a sleek, synth-driven indie pop texture wrapped in a dark, satirical, and slightly melancholic emotional atmosphere. Powered by an understated yet infectious energy, the music features a crisp, minimalistic drum machine groove coupled with punchy basslines and clean synthesizer melodies. The production quality is exceptionally spacious and polished, allowing the intimate dual-vocal harmonies and subtle instrumentation to sit together in a balanced, uncluttered mix. A particularly striking transition occurs in the outro, where a robotic spoken-word monologue about corporate authenticity gives way to a haunting, rhythmic vocal chant.

review.review_text: "Authenticity Factory" is 4Castle in a colder, more deliberate mode: a midtempo 103 BPM groove in D minor built on a crisp drum-machine pulse and punchy bass, with the usual face-melting guitar pulled way back in favor of space and restraint. The satire is the whole point and it lands, especially the gut-punch line "Our greatest resource is our people, until you're not, then we delete you," and the corporate spoken-word monologue in the outro before it dissolves into that chanted "You are the product, you are bent." It's a slow build rather than an immediate hook, and listeners who come to this band for the harmony-stacked rock fireworks may need a couple of spins to settle in. A grower that rewards the patient.
anchors_used: Our greatest resource is our people, until you're not, then we delete you
You are the product, you are bent
